name: ShieldCortex Real-time Scanner
description: Real-time defence scanning on LLM input, memory extraction on LLM output, and active tool call interception with approval gating.

binaryPath.label: ShieldCortex Binary Path
binaryPath.help: Optional absolute path to the shieldcortex CLI when it is not on PATH.

cloudApiKey.label: Cloud API Key
cloudApiKey.help: Optional ShieldCortex Cloud API key used for realtime threat forwarding.

cloudBaseUrl.label: Cloud Base URL
cloudBaseUrl.help: Override the ShieldCortex Cloud API base URL if you use a self-hosted or staging endpoint.

openclawAutoMemory.label: Auto Memory Extraction
openclawAutoMemory.help: Extract high-signal decisions and learnings from LLM output into ShieldCortex memory.

openclawAutoMemoryDedupe.label: Dedupe Auto Memory
openclawAutoMemoryDedupe.help: Skip near-duplicate memories before they are written to ShieldCortex.

openclawAutoMemoryNoveltyThreshold.label: Novelty Threshold
openclawAutoMemoryNoveltyThreshold.help: Similarity threshold for duplicate suppression. Higher values keep more memories.

openclawAutoMemoryMaxRecent.label: Recent Memory Cache Size
openclawAutoMemoryMaxRecent.help: How many recent extracted memories to keep in the dedupe cache.

interceptor.enabled.label: Enable Tool Call Interceptor
interceptor.enabled.description: Scan memory-write tool calls and gate suspicious content behind user approval

interceptor.severityActions.high.label: High Severity Action
interceptor.severityActions.high.description: Action for high-severity threats (log, warn, require_approval)

interceptor.severityActions.critical.label: Critical Severity Action
interceptor.severityActions.critical.description: Action for critical-severity threats (log, warn, require_approval)
